HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CHERYL KIDD'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. CHERYL KIDD HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN.
